_storage_note: "json" (default) or "sqlite". SQLite uses single-row upserts for enrichment — much faster for large indexes. Switching to sqlite auto-migrates existing JSON index.
_index_dir_note: Directory for index files (.doc-index.json or .doc-index.db). For cross-platform sync, use absolute path to cloud folder, e.g. G:/My Drive/astrolabe (Win) or /Volumes/GoogleDrive/My Drive/astrolabe (Mac)
_private_note: Optional: private_projects are stored in private_index_dir (local, not cloud-synced). Remove these lines if not needed.
_ignore_note: Git-aware scanning excludes gitignored files automatically. ignore_dirs/ignore_files only need domain-specific exclusions — git-tracked dirs/files you don't want in the knowledge index.
